title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 162.800 - Board of advisors — compensation and expenses of members
text:
162.800.  Board of advisors — compensation and expenses of members. — Each member of the board of advisors of the school for the blind and of the board of advisors of the school for the deaf shall receive as compensation for his services the salary of one hundred dollars per annum and his actual expenses.
(L. 1973 H.B. 474 § 31) 
Effective 7-1-74
